headline: ₹1,000-2,000 Cr at risk — SBI's ₹1,760 Cr investment in Yes Bank's FPO signals governance confidence, boosts capital base
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, GRI, DJSI, ESRS frameworks; no regulatory deadline or penalty.
No direct P/E rerating; possible stabilization of share price volatility.
Potential for modest reduction in cost of capital; no immediate bond spread impact detected.
